examples: The geospace, which includes the upper atmosphere, ionosphere and magnetosphere, is the most important region of human space activities.
Relative plate motion can not demonstrate the motion velocity of individual plate, while absolute plate motion can show the motion velocity in the stationary geospace.
Geospace reported fourth quarter earnings per share (EPS) of 33 cents, which missed the Zacks Consensus Estimate but advanced 17.9% from the year-ago quarter.
